title: Dock Pressure
intendedTensionBeat: Dock pressure appears without water so the player can attribute mistakes to rack sequencing.
intendedReleaseBeat: Disciplined dock play opens the puppy route cleanly.
expectedPath: Clear groups in an order that avoids mismatched dock buildup while opening the central rescue lane.
expectedFailMode: Player hoards mismatched side groups, triggers Dock Jam, and learns the dock is not free storage.
designNotes: The dock must serve the rescue route. Do not let this read as a pure rack-management level.
